sentences.text_original: 你每天怎么去上班？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān zěnme qù shàngbān?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni ishga qanday borasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты каждый день добираешься на работу?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you get to work every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我坐地铁。地铁很快，也很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zuò dìtiě. Dìtiě hěn kuài, yě hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Metroda. Metro juda tez va qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На метро. Метро быстрое и удобное.
sentences.text_translation_en: I take the subway. It's fast and convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 地铁人多不多？
sentences.pinyin: Dìtiě rén duō bu duō?
sentences.text_translation: Metroda odam ko'pmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В метро много людей?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is the subway crowded?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 早上特别多，有时候挤不上去。
sentences.pinyin: Zǎoshang tèbié duō, yǒu shíhou jǐ bú shàng qù.
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab juda ko'p, ba'zan tiqilib chiqib bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Утром особенно много, иногда даже не втиснуться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Especially in the morning — sometimes you can't even squeeze in.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你为什么不早点出门？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ wèishénme bù zǎo diǎn chūmén?
sentences.text_translation: Unda nega ertaroq chiqmaysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда почему ты не выходишь пораньше?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then why don't you leave a bit earlier?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我已经提早了。但是早高峰人还是很多。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng tízǎo le. Dànshì zǎo gāofēng rén háishì hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: Allaqachon ertaroq chiqyapman. Lekin ertalabki tirbandlikda baribir odam ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я и так выхожу раньше. Но в утренний час пик людей всё равно много.
sentences.text_translation_en: I already leave early. But there are still tons of people in the morning rush hour.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你坐几号线？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò jǐ hào xiàn?
sentences.text_translation: Necha raqamli liniyada yurasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: По какой линии ты ездишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which line do you take?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 二号线。从我家到公司，一共六站。
sentences.pinyin: Èr hào xiàn. Cóng wǒ jiā dào gōngsī, yígòng liù zhàn.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkinchi liniya. Uydan ofisgacha jami olti bekat.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вторая линия. От дома до работы всего шесть станций.
sentences.text_translation_en: Line 2. From home to the office it's six stops in total.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那很近啊。你考虑过骑车上班吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn jìn a. Nǐ kǎolǜ guo qí chē shàngbān ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda juda yaqin-ku. Velosipedda ishga borishni o'ylab ko'rganmisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Так это близко. А ты не думал ездить на работу на велосипеде?
sentences.text_translation_en: That's close, then. Have you considered cycling to work?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 考虑过。但是路上车太多，不太安全。
sentences.pinyin: Kǎolǜ guo. Dànshì lù shàng chē tài duō, bú tài ānquán.
sentences.text_translation: O'ylab ko'rganman. Lekin yo'lda mashina juda ko'p, unchalik xavfsiz emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Думал. Но на дороге слишком много машин, не очень безопасно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. But there are too many cars on the road — it's not very safe.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 也是。最近交通越来越堵了。
sentences.pinyin: Yě shì. Zuìjìn jiāotōng yuè lái yuè dǔ le.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Yaqinda yo'l harakati tobora tirband bo'lyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: И правда. В последнее время на дорогах всё больше пробок.
sentences.text_translation_en: True. Traffic has been getting more and more jammed lately.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊。尤其是下雨天，堵得特别厉害。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a. Yóuqí shì xià yǔ tiān, dǔ de tèbié lìhai.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Ayniqsa yomg'irli kunlari juda qattiq tirband bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Особенно в дождливые дни пробки просто ужасные.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah. Especially on rainy days, the jams are really bad.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一般几点出门？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yìbān jǐ diǎn chūmén?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda soat nechada chiqasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты обычно выходишь?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you usually head out?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 七点半。到公司差不多八点十分。
sentences.pinyin: Qī diǎn bàn. Dào gōngsī chàbuduō bā diǎn shí fēn.
sentences.text_translation: Yetti yarimda. Ofisga deyarli sakkizu o'n daqiqada yetib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В полвосьмого. До работы добираюсь примерно к 8:10.
sentences.text_translation_en: Seven thirty. I get to the office at about ten past eight.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那路上要四十分钟啊。
sentences.pinyin: Nà lù shàng yào sìshí fēnzhōng a.
sentences.text_translation: Demak yo'lda qirq daqiqa ketadi-da.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Значит, дорога занимает сорок минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: So it takes forty minutes on the way.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。要是不堵车，二十分钟就到了。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Yàoshi bù dǔchē, èrshí fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha. Tirbandlik bo'lmasa, yigirma daqiqada yetib boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Если бы не пробки, доехал бы за двадцать минут.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. If there's no traffic jam, I'd be there in twenty minutes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你周末出门也坐地铁吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōumò chūmén yě zuò dìtiě ma?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari ham metroda yurasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На выходных ты тоже ездишь на метро?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you take the subway on weekends too?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不一定。周末我更喜欢走路或者骑共享单车。
sentences.pinyin: Bù yídìng. Zhōumò wǒ gèng xǐhuān zǒulù huòzhě qí gòngxiǎng dānchē.
sentences.text_translation: Har doim emas. Dam olish kunlari ko'proq piyoda yurish yoki ijara velosipedda yurishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не всегда. По выходным я больше люблю ходить пешком или брать велосипед каршеринга.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not necessarily. On weekends I prefer walking or riding a shared bike.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 共享单车很方便，到处都能找到。
sentences.pinyin: Gòngxiǎng dānchē hěn fāngbiàn, dàochù dōu néng zhǎodào.
sentences.text_translation: Ijara velosiped juda qulay, hamma joydan topsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Велосипеды каршеринга очень удобны — их можно найти повсюду.
sentences.text_translation_en: Shared bikes are really convenient — you can find them everywhere.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，而且比坐车便宜多了。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, érqiě bǐ zuò chē piányi duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, ustiga-ustak transportda yurishdan ancha arzon.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, и к тому же намного дешевле, чем ездить на транспорте.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, and it's much cheaper than taking transport.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时会选择打车吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí huì xuǎnzé dǎchē ma?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda taksi chaqirishni tanlaysanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты обычно выбираешь такси?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you usually opt for a taxi?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很少。除非很急，不然我觉得打车不划算。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn shǎo. Chúfēi hěn jí, bùrán wǒ juéde dǎchē bù huásuàn.
sentences.text_translation: Juda kam. Juda shoshilmasam, taksi olish menimcha foydali emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень редко. Если только не спешу — иначе считаю, что такси невыгодно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Rarely. Unless I'm in a rush, I don't think taking a taxi is worth it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说得对，省钱又环保。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, shěng qián yòu huánbǎo.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan — pulni ham tejaydi, atrof-muhitga ham foydali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав — и деньги экономишь, и для экологии полезно.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right — it saves money and it's eco-friendly.
sentences.speaker: A
